languages.text: "Полагаю, первым должен говорить наиболее непредвзятый участник событий. Нунциус?"
"I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "Полагаю, первым должен говорить наиболее непредвзятый участник событий. Нунциус?"

traits.locale_text: "I believe the least biased participant should speak first. Nuntius?"
"I believe the least biased participant should speak first. Nuntius?"
"I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"
"I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"
"I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"
"I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

languages.text: "Ich denke, der am wenigsten voreingenommene Beteiligte sollte zuerst sprechen. Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, der am wenigsten voreingenommene Beteiligte sollte zuerst sprechen. Nuncius?"

languages.text: « Je crois qu'il faut laisser parler le moins partial en premier. Nuncius ? »
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: « Je crois qu'il faut laisser parler le moins partial en premier. Nuncius ? »

languages.text: “我认为，应当由最公正的那方优先进行发言。努恩修斯？”
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: “我认为，应当由最公正的那方优先进行发言。努恩修斯？”

languages.text: «Creo que el participante menos sesgado debería empezar. ¿Nuncius?».
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: «Creo que el participante menos sesgado debería empezar. ¿Nuncius?».

languages.text: "最も偏見のない参加者が最初に話すべきだと思う。ヌンシウス？"
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

languages.text: "Bence en tarafsız katılımcı ilk konuşmalı. Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: "Bence en tarafsız katılımcı ilk konuşmalı. Nuncius?"
